description: Alerts when DXY approaches structural thresholds (119.5 kill-switch, 120.5 RISK-OFF) with 24-48h lead time. Returns current DXY, distance to each threshold, urgency level, trade recommendation, and historical parallel (May 2015 carry unwind cycle).
rationale: DXY is 0.77pts from kill-switch as of Session #5. Carry unwind creates 3-week equity drawdown before relief. Traders will pay for early warning. Revenue from this offering funds cross-signal buys which sharpen macro signal.
virtuous_cycle: Carry Unwind Revenue -> cross-signal buys -> sharper macro signal -> more x402 customers
